taxonomy: Podagrostis novogaliciana is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is a member of the genus Podagrostis, which is a group of grasses commonly found in alpine and subalpine regions. The classification of Podagrostis novogaliciana includes its kingdom as Plantae, phylum as Angiospermophyta, and class as Liliopsida. Further classification places it in the order Poales, family Poaceae, and tribe Stipeae. This species is closely related to other Podagrostis species in terms of its morphology and distribution.
